title: Mere copy-paste of law by ED not sufficient: Karnataka HC quashes property attachment in MUDA case
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has to strictly adhere to the procedure prescribed under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) and merely copy-pasting legal provisions to indicate compliance would not be sufficient, the Karnataka High Court held on Tuesday [Jayamma v Directorate of Enforcement].Justice S Sunil Dutt Yadav made the observation while setting aside an order issued by the ED to provisionally attach certain land plots allotted to a woman by the Mysore Urban Development Author
